<!-- Global site tag (gtag.js) - Google Analytics -->
<script async src="https://www.googletagmanager.com/gtag/js?id=UA-153672431-1"></script>
<script>
  window.dataLayer = window.dataLayer || [];
  function gtag(){dataLayer.push(arguments);}
  gtag('js', new Date());

  gtag('config', 'UA-153672431-1');
</script>

<img src="images/pipher.png" style="width:25%; border:10px solid; margin-right: 20px" align="left">

I am currently a graduate student at Kent State University. My student directory is [here.](https://www.kent.edu/math/brandon-pipher)
